title: selaginella mutica
intro: Selaginella mutica, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its unique, fern-like foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella mutica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral and anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella mutica is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
